subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! Be thou not disheartened, withered and despondent on account of the multitude of debts and obligations. Praise be to God, the dawn [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی از کثرت قروض و دیون افسرده و پژمرده و نومید مگرد الحمد لله صبح
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
